issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (when this card attacks), not 'Activated' (manual activation)
Condition should be 'Always' or removed; 'HasRestingDon' checks board state but card effect only requires DON!! cost in cost line, not a condition
Target should specify 'count':1 to match 'up to 1' in text; current ChooseOpponentCharacter lacks count constraint

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2000 power during this turn.
